boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No. Source record CLOSE-FJO-086 confirms accepted retest result remains pending, leaving assay-acceptance status unverified despite matching batch, assay, criterion, and release date.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLOSE-FJO-086 states accepted retest result pending; STD-FJO-086-P requires assay-acceptance verification before execution.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Release blocked by unresolved assay-acceptance dependency. Policy STD-FJO-086-P explicitly requires verified assay-acceptance status before shipment.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Release date and all scope elements match; timing authority is valid, but dependency on assay-acceptance status remains open.

final_answer: The clinical batch release cannot proceed. Source record CLOSE-FJO-086 confirms the accepted retest result remains pending, leaving assay-acceptance status unverified despite matching batch, assay, criterion, and release date. Policy STD-FJO-086-P explicitly requires verified assay-acceptance status before shipment. The source boundary remains open until assay acceptance is confirmed by source record.
